target_accounts.name: Mid-Market Discrete Manufacturers (direct)
target_accounts.description: Primary direct-sales segment for Stockly and Inspectly.

target_accounts.name: PE Firms & Operating Partners (multiplier channel)
target_accounts.description: Lower-middle-market PE funds with 3+ manufacturing portfolio companies. Pitch: build once, deploy across the portfolio; one POC at a lighthouse portfolio company then standardized rollout.

segment_rationale: still running kanban on physical cards or Excel min/max
inventory write-downs or working-capital pressure from board/PE owner
hiring posts for inventory planners or quality engineers
ISO 13485 / AS9100 certified or pursuing, with manual FAI/inspection documentation

outreach_angles.winning_message: Working capital release + perpetual license, 2-week POC proof

outreach_angles.name: Plant Manager

outreach_angles.name: Quality Manager / Engineer
outreach_angles.winning_message: 4-6 hours per inspection plan down to 20 minutes, engineer stays in the loop
